writing.task1:
Dear HR Manager
I would like to ask for permission to work from home for two weeks, because I need to take care of a family member.I will keep my normal working hours 8hours and will be available by email, phone, and urgent work. I will make sure my tasks are done on time.
Thank you
writing.task2: I agree because free public Wi-Fi in big parks can help more people use the internet, especially those who do not have mobile data. This is useful for students, people looking for jobs, and tourists. For example, in New York City, the LinkNYC program gives free Wi-Fi in public places, so people can do homework, apply for jobs, or find directions without paying for internet.
writing.task3: The table shows that podcasts took the most time each week 90 minutes and gave a 6-point gain. Flashcards took 70 minutes and gave 5 points. Speaking club took 80 minutes but gave the best result, with an 8-point gain.Speaking club may work better because learners use the language actively when talking, which helps them improve faster.
